results.title: 5 Proven Strategies to Scale Your SaaS Business
results.snippet: Product-led growth (PLG) loops are strategies in which the product itself drives customer acquisition, retention, and referrals. In a PLG loop, satisfied users share your product or features, encouraging others to try it. This creates a cycle of continuous growth.
